goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should go to 'broxbourne'.
The train should 'leave after 10:15' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
